apify_linkedin_urls: site:linkedin.com/company VC Lab - The Premiere Venture Capital Accelerator - VC Lab

apify_company_profile_items.tagline: A Gen Z operated venture capital firm supporting innovation in early-stage software startups.
apify_company_profile_items.description:
EdgeCase Capital Partners is a venture capital group dedicated to supporting innovation and creating impact in early-stage software startups. 

EdgeCase is the SEC, FINRA certified entity that ensures scouts get carry on deals they flag. We've extended this to top talent tracking at universities and frequently do on-campus activations for VCs. This rapidly grows the brand presence of our venture partners and actively supports the entrepreneurial ecosystems. EdgeCase's mission is to provide upfront value to the startup community, working with any inspired student, and weaving next gen talent into our world, connecting the dots. We call them EdgeCases and leave no stone unturned, collaborating with countless students, entrepreneurs, and VCs from around the world.
apify_company_profile_items.industryV2Taxonomy: Venture Capital and Private Equity Principals
